title: Roasted Chicken Leg Delight
description: A simple yet flavorful recipe for roasted chicken legs, perfect for a quick dinner. The wholesome ingredients bring out the natural taste of the chicken.
instructions: Rinse the chicken legs and pat them dry with paper towels.
In a small bowl, mix together olive oil, salt, black pepper, garlic powder, and thyme.
Add the chicken legs to the bowl and toss them to coat with the marinade.
Place the chicken legs on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Squeeze the lemon juice over the chicken legs.
Roast in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Let the chicken rest for 5 minutes before serving.
